creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #67)
It just doesn't work now (AFAIU): https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=270189

> IGNORE_FreeBSD_14=Failed to construct device 'VMMDev'
Exact this line or is it an example?

For all 3 ports?

If somebody know how to do this correct please write.
